'''ngamuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacucentrifuge|vacucentrifuge]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-m-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacucentrifuge|vacucentrifuge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngamuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæmihith|ngæmihith]] || [[word:ngæmihij|ngæmihij]] || [[word:ngæmihish|ngæmihish]] || [[word:ngæmihi|ngæmihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngamumuhuth|ngamumuhuth]] || [[word:ngamumuhuj|ngamumuhuj]] || [[word:ngamumuhush|ngamumuhush]] || [[word:ngamumuhu|ngamumuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngamuhuth|ngamuhuth]] || [[word:ngamuhuj|ngamuhuj]] || [[word:ngamuhush|ngamuhush]] || [[word:ngamuhu|ngamuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngamufhuth|ngamufhuth]] || [[word:ngamufhuj|ngamufhuj]] || [[word:ngamufhush|ngamufhush]] || [[word:ngamufhuf|ngamufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngamuhuthu|ngamuhuthu]] || [[word:ngamuhuju|ngamuhuju]] || [[word:ngamuhushu|ngamuhushu]] || [[word:ngamuhuku|ngamuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngamuhuth|ngamuhuth]] || [[word:ngamuhuj|ngamuhuj]] || [[word:ngamuhush|ngamuhush]] || [[word:ngamuhu|ngamuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngamuhuthul|ngamuhuthul]] || [[word:ngamuhujul|ngamuhujul]] || [[word:ngamuhushul|ngamuhushul]] || [[word:ngamuhukul|ngamuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngamuhuthuthu|ngamuhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngamuhujuju|ngamuhujuju]] || [[word:ngamuhushushu|ngamuhushushu]] || [[word:ngamuhuku|ngamuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngamuhuthun|ngamuhuthun]] || [[word:ngamuhujun|ngamuhujun]] || [[word:ngamuhushun|ngamuhushun]] || [[word:ngamuhukun|ngamuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngamuhuthuoro|ngamuhuthuoro]] || [[word:ngamuhujuoro|ngamuhujuoro]] || [[word:ngamuhushuoro|ngamuhushuoro]] || [[word:ngamuhukuoro|ngamuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
